checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Verify wallet-based authentication for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Check if the process for submitting an RFRV on the Governance Forum requires the user to authenticate using their crypto wallet before allowing submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or recording of RFRV submission flow demonstrating wallet authentication requirement.

checklist_items.title: Confirm RFRV submitters have linked on-chain identity enforced
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum system configuration enforces the requirement for a forum account to be linked to a specific on-chain identity (e.g., wallet address) before allowing RFRV submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration settings documentation or system access confirming enforcement rule.

checklist_items.title: Test RFRV submission without required authentication/linking
checklist_items.description: Conduct a test case to attempt submitting an RFRV on the Governance Forum using an unauthenticated session or a forum account without a verified linked on-chain identity, and confirm the submission is blocked.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Test case log showing the blocked submission attempt and error response.

checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires users submitting RFRVs to have their forum account linked to a verifiable on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO) for RFRV submission.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of the RFRV submission process and verification steps, or a screenshot demonstrating the linked identity requirement during submission.
